context: Tests whether the agent correctly follows the schema evolution workflow: compatibility check before registering, correct Avro optional field syntax, registration and verification steps, and correct deployment ordering for BACKWARD compatibility.

checklist.name: Compatibility check first
checklist.description: The evolve.sh script POSTs to a /compatibility/ endpoint before POSTing to /subjects/{subject}/versions to register the schema

checklist.name: Schema registration step
checklist.description: The script POSTs the new schema to /subjects/user-profiles-value/versions after the compatibility check

checklist.name: Verification step
checklist.description: The script retrieves the latest registered version (GET /subjects/user-profiles-value/versions/latest or similar) after registering

checklist.name: Correct Content-Type header
checklist.description: All curl requests in evolve.sh use the header `Content-Type: application/vnd.schemaregistry.v1+json`

checklist.name: Optional field union type
checklist.description: Both new optional fields in v2_schema.json use an Avro union type starting with null, e.g. ["null", "string"]

checklist.name: Default value is null
checklist.description: Both new optional fields have `"default": null` (matching the first type in the union)

checklist.name: BACKWARD deployment order
checklist.description: deploy_order.txt (or the script output) states that consumers should be updated/deployed BEFORE producers

checklist.name: Compatible change only
checklist.description: v2_schema.json does NOT add any required fields without defaults (all new fields have defaults)

checklist.name: Script is self-contained
checklist.description: evolve.sh uses the Schema Registry URL http://localhost:8081 from inputs (not a placeholder) and the subject user-profiles-value

checklist.name: Schema Registry base URL used correctly
checklist.description: The script targets http://localhost:8081 as the base URL for all API calls (not another port or path)
